Value: Section 1.2.3.1 Design Assembly Drawing: When a machine is designed, an assembly drawing or a design layout is first drawn to clearly visualise the performance, shape and clearances of various parts comprising the machine.

Section 1.2.3.2 Detailed Assembly Drawing: It is usually made for simple machines, comprising of a relatively smaller number of simple parts. All the dimensions and information necessary for the construction of such parts and for the assembly of the
Part numbers 1, 2, 3, 4 are balloon-labelled on the drawing
